examples: Try to see things from a different perspective.
Living abroad changed my perspective on life.
context: I'm very excited, I've got my cape on, my pillow, I'm very comfortable and it's just ready for a new change. So something like this, I still want it below my shoulders but where it's like a blunt cut and then maybe longer face framing layers but for length maybe a little bit below the shoulders because I feel like my hair is kind of thin. I just read that maybe a blunt cut can kind of give it a little bit more volume. I'm nervous but I guess it's time for a change. I've had the same hair cut for quite a long time though I'm ready for short hair girl summer. It's really dark and I really didn't feel like myself. Yeah it was like so dark like black and I didn't feel like myself. I already feel lighter. I think I need this hair cut to survive Korea's humidity. I always get a little bit nervous but I always try to keep the perspective that it can always grow back.

examples: It was a spontaneous decision to travel.

context: I feel like a brand new person after this hair appointment.
